title: Yasa Social Media Hub - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Implement Internet Identity authentication UI with user session management
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register and login using Internet Identity
User sessions persist across page refreshes
Authenticated users have unique identities stored in the backend

file_operations.description: Create LoginButton component with Internet Identity integration. Use the authorization component to handle login/logout flow, clear query cache on logout, and display loading states during authentication. Component should trigger profile setup flow after successful login.
Create AuthGuard component that wraps protected routes and redirects unauthenticated users to login page. Shows loading state while verifying authentication status.

requirements.summary: Create user profile management UI with username, bio, and photo upload
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create and update their profile with username and bio
Profile photos can be uploaded and displayed
Profiles are stored persistently in the backend
Users can view their own and other users' profiles

file_operations.description: Create custom hooks for user profile management including useGetCallerUserProfile (with proper actor dependency handling to prevent modal flash), useSaveCallerUserProfile, and useGetUserProfile. Use the authorization component's getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile methods. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create modal component for first-time profile setup that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter username and bio. Use blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromBytes() for profile photo uploads with upload progress tracking. Modal should only appear when isAuthenticated && !profileLoading && isFetched && userProfile === null.

Create user profile page displaying username, bio, profile photo (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() for photo rendering from frontend/public/assets/generated/avatar-placeholder.dim_128x128.png as fallback), follower/following counts, and user's posts. Include edit profile button for current user.

Create edit profile modal allowing users to update username, bio, and profile photo. Use blob-storage component's ExternalBlob for photo uploads with progress tracking via withUploadProgress(). Include privacy setting toggle for public/private profile visibility.

requirements.summary: Build text messaging UI for sending and receiving messages between users
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send text messages to other users
Messages are displayed in chronological order
Message history persists in the backend
Users can view their conversation history with other users
New messages appear without requiring page refresh

file_operations.description: Create hooks for messaging including useGetMessages, useSendMessage, and useMarkMessageAsRead. Implement polling mechanism (not WebSocket) to periodically fetch new messages for real-time-like updates.
Create messages page with conversation list showing recent chats with other users. Display unread message indicators and last message preview. Include search/filter for conversations.

Create conversation view component displaying message history with selected user in chronological order. Include message input field with send button. Messages auto-refresh via polling. Show sender profile photos and timestamps.

requirements.summary: Create photo and video post sharing UI with caption and media upload
acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload photos and videos from their device
Posts include caption text and timestamp
Posts are stored in the backend and associated with the user who created them
Users can view a feed of posts from all users

file_operations.description: Create hooks for post management including useGetPublicPosts, useCreatePost, useDeletePost. Use blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromBytes() for media uploads with upload progress tracking via withUploadProgress().

Create post creation modal with file input for photos/videos (multiple), caption text area, and visibility selector (public/private). Use blob-storage component for media uploads. Display upload progress. Use frontend/public/assets/generated/camera-icon.dim_64x64.png for the camera icon.

Create post card component displaying post media (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() for streaming/caching), caption, author username and profile photo, timestamp, like count, and comments. Include like button with frontend/public/assets/generated/heart-icon.dim_48x48.png icon and comment input section.

requirements.summary: Implement ephemeral Stories UI that expires after 24 hours
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create story posts with images and text
Stories are displayed separately from regular posts
Stories automatically expire and are removed 24 hours after creation
Users can view active stories from other users
Story timestamp shows time remaining before expiration

file_operations.description: Create hooks for story management including useGetUserStories and useCreateStory. Use blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromBytes() for story media uploads.

Create horizontal stories bar component displaying circular profile photos of users with active stories. Clicking opens story viewer modal. Filter out expired stories (expiresAt < current timestamp) on the frontend.

Create story viewer modal displaying story media (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL()), author info, and time remaining until expiration. Include navigation controls for viewing multiple stories from same user.

Create story creation modal with image/video upload and optional text overlay. Use blob-storage component for media uploads with progress tracking. Stories automatically expire 24 hours after creation.

requirements.summary: Create content feed UI with infinite scroll displaying all posts in reverse chronological order
acceptanceCriteria: Feed displays all user posts sorted by newest first
Posts show username, profile photo, caption, image/video, and timestamp
Infinite scroll loads more posts as user scrolls down
Feed updates when new posts are created

file_operations.description: Create main feed page displaying posts in reverse chronological order using PostCard components. Implement infinite scroll using Intersection Observer API to load more posts as user scrolls. Include pull-to-refresh functionality for mobile. Display StoriesBar component at top of feed.

requirements.summary: Implement like and comment UI on posts with interaction counts
acceptanceCriteria: Users can like/unlike posts with a heart icon
Like count is displayed on each post
Users can add text comments to posts
Comments display with username and timestamp
All interactions persist in the backend

file_operations.description: Create hooks for post interactions including useLikePost, useUnlikePost, and useCommentOnPost. Handle optimistic updates for immediate UI feedback.
Create comments list component displaying all comments for a post with author usernames, profile photos, timestamps, and comment text. Include form for adding new comments.

requirements.summary: Create privacy controls UI for profile and post visibility settings
acceptanceCriteria: Users have privacy settings in their profile (public/private)
Private profiles only show content to approved followers
Users can set individual post visibility settings
Privacy settings are enforced by backend queries

file_operations.description: Create privacy settings section in EditProfileModal allowing users to toggle profile visibility (public/private). Display explanation text about what each setting means for content visibility.

requirements.summary: Implement follow/unfollow UI with followers and following lists
acceptanceCriteria: Users can follow and unfollow other users
Follow relationships are stored in the backend
Users can view their followers and following lists
Follower and following counts are displayed on profiles

file_operations.description: Create hooks for follow management including useFollowUser, useUnfollowUser, useGetFollowers, and useGetFollowing. Handle optimistic updates for follow/unfollow actions.
Create follow/unfollow button component displaying current follow state. Button disabled for current user's own profile. Style changes based on follow state (Follow/Following/Unfollow).
Create modal displaying list of followers with usernames and profile photos. Clicking a user navigates to their profile.
Create modal displaying list of users being followed with usernames and profile photos. Clicking a user navigates to their profile.

requirements.summary: Create user search UI for finding users by username
acceptanceCriteria: Users can search for other users by typing username
Search results display matching usernames with profile photos
Clicking a result navigates to that user's profile
Search is performed in the backend

file_operations.description: Create hook for user search using searchUsers backend method. Implement debouncing to avoid excessive backend calls while typing.

Create search page with search input field and results list. Display user cards with profile photos (using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() or frontend/public/assets/generated/avatar-placeholder.dim_128x128.png fallback), usernames, and bio snippets. Clicking navigates to user profile.

requirements.summary: Implement notification system UI for likes, comments, follows, and messages
acceptanceCriteria: Notifications are generated for likes, comments, follows, and new messages
Users can view a list of all notifications
Unread notification count is displayed
Notifications can be marked as read
Notifications persist in the backend

file_operations.description: Create hooks for notifications including useGetNotifications and useMarkNotificationAsRead. Implement polling to fetch new notifications periodically.

Create notifications page displaying list of all notifications sorted by timestamp (newest first). Show unread badge for unread notifications. Clicking notification marks it as read and navigates to relevant content (post, profile, etc.).
Create notification badge component displaying unread notification count. Used in navigation bar. Shows red badge with count when unread notifications exist.

requirements.summary: Create content reporting UI with reason categories for posts and users
acceptanceCriteria: Users can report posts or profiles with a report button
Report form includes reason categories (spam, harassment, inappropriate content, etc.)
Reports are stored in the backend with reporter identity, target, and reason
Reported content is flagged for review

file_operations.description: Create hooks for reporting including useReportContent. Admin-only hook useGetReports for viewing all reports.

Create report modal with reason selection (dropdown or radio buttons) including categories: spam, harassment, inappropriate content, false information, other. Include optional text area for additional details. Submit button calls reportContent backend method.

Create admin-only reports page displaying all submitted reports with reporter, reported content/user, reason, and timestamp. Only accessible to users with admin role. Use authorization component to check isCallerAdmin() before rendering.

requirements.summary: Design modern mobile-first UI with coral-to-purple gradient theme and Instagram-inspired layout
acceptanceCriteria: UI uses a coral-to-purple gradient color palette consistently
Components have rounded corners and subtle shadows for depth
Smooth transitions and animations enhance user interactions
Bottom navigation bar provides quick access to main features
Layout is responsive and mobile-optimized
Typography is clean and legible with proper hierarchy

file_operations.description: Define custom CSS variables for coral-to-purple gradient color palette (--color-coral, --color-purple, gradient stops). Add base styles for rounded corners (border-radius utilities), subtle shadows (box-shadow utilities), and smooth transitions. Ensure mobile-first responsive typography with proper hierarchy.

Extend Tailwind theme with custom coral-to-purple gradient colors matching design requirement. Add custom border-radius values for rounded cards. Define custom box-shadow utilities for depth. Configure responsive breakpoints for mobile-first design.

Create main layout component with bottom navigation bar for mobile (Home/Feed, Search, Messages, Notifications, Profile icons). Include header with app logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_256x256.png. Apply coral-to-purple gradient styling. Render children in main content area.

Create bottom navigation component with icons for main features: Feed (home), Search, Messages (using frontend/public/assets/generated/chat-icon.dim_48x48.png), Notifications (bell), Profile. Highlight active route. Fixed position at bottom on mobile.

requirements.summary: Wire generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated into UI as static assets
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are displayed in appropriate locations (logo in header, placeholders, backgrounds)
Images maintain proper aspect ratios and responsive sizing
No backend calls are made to serve these static assets

file_operations.description: Create hero section component using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png as background image. Display app title 'Yasa' with gradient text effect and tagline. Include call-to-action for login/signup. Only shown to unauthenticated users on landing page.

Wire all created components into routing structure. Define routes: / (landing with HeroSection for unauthenticated, FeedPage for authenticated wrapped in AuthGuard), /profile/:userId (ProfilePage wrapped in AuthGuard), /messages (MessagesPage wrapped in AuthGuard), /messages/:userId (ConversationView wrapped in AuthGuard), /search (SearchPage wrapped in AuthGuard), /notifications (NotificationsPage wrapped in AuthGuard), /admin/reports (ReportsPage wrapped in AuthGuard with admin check). Wrap authenticated routes with AppLayout for consistent navigation. Show ProfileSetupModal when needed using the pattern: isAuthenticated && !profileLoading && isFetched && userProfile === null.
